dataset: JéGO Zero Carbon — Intern Assignment Mock Dataset
description: Simulated 24-hour telematics feed for a 3-vehicle EV fleet, Lagos, Nigeria (WAT UTC+1). Contains intentional data quality issues (GPS gaps, duplicate timestamps, out-of-range SoC) and motor current anomalies for candidate analysis.

field_descriptions.latitude: GPS latitude — null on gps_gap events
field_descriptions.longitude: GPS longitude — null on gps_gap events
field_descriptions.trip_id: Trip segment ID — null during idle and overnight
field_descriptions.event: trip | idle | regen_braking | gps_gap | soc_error | duplicate_ts | overnight_idle
